info.title: WaylandDotnet.Scanner
info.description: Wayland protocol scanner that generates C# bindings from XML protocol definitions

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Wayland protocol scanner - Generate C# bindings from Wayland XML protocols

options.name: --namespace
options.description: Namespace/category for the protocol (e.g., Core, Stable, Wlr)

arguments.name: input
arguments.description: Input XML protocol file or JSON config file

arguments.name: output
arguments.description: Output directory for generated C# files

commands.name: list
commands.description: List available protocols in config file

arguments.name: input
arguments.description: Input XML protocol file or JSON config file

commands.name: init
commands.description: Create a default protocols.json configuration file
